name: [smoke] appearance="auto" renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="neutral" renders without crashing

[smoke] appearance="secondary" renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="sparkle" renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="negative" renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="positive" renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="warning" renders without crashing
[smoke] appearance="informative" renders without crashing

[smoke] shape="pill" renders without crashing
[fn] shape="pill" applies pill border radius
[fn] shape="default" size="m" applies per-size radius
[smoke] renders without crashing
[smoke] renders with placeholder (TextInput found via includeHiddenElements)
[smoke] renders disabled without crashing
[smoke] renders readOnly without crashing
[smoke] renders errorHighlight without crashing
[smoke] renders all sizes without crashing
[smoke] renders with all 4 slots without crashing
[fn] testID goes to the outer Pressable (tap-forwarder), not TextInput
[fn] outer Pressable has importantForAccessibility="no"
[fn] outer Pressable is disabled when input is disabled
[fn] outer Pressable is disabled when input is readOnly
[fn] size="s" (8) → minHeight = tokens.spacing["8"]
[fn] size="m" (10) → minHeight = tokens.spacing["10"] (default)
[fn] size="l" (12) → minHeight = tokens.spacing["12"]
[fn] default size is "m" (minHeight = tokens.spacing["10"])
[fn] size scale: s < m < l (monotonically increasing)
[fn] string size aliases: s/m/l resolve to their respective sizes
[fn] attention="medium" → outlined: borderWidth = idle hairline at rest
[fn] attention="high" → filled: borderWidth = 0 at rest (no border)
[fn] placeholder renders in TextInput
[fn] controlled value renders in TextInput
[fn] defaultValue renders in TextInput (uncontrolled)
[fn] onChange fires with typed value
[fn] onChange fires with exact value each keystroke
[fn] onFocus fires when TextInput receives focus
[fn] onBlur fires when TextInput loses focus
[fn] onFocus and onBlur fire independently
[fn] onSubmit fires with current value on submit
[fn] disabled input: onFocus NOT fired (handleFocus guards isDisabled)
[fn] disabled input → editable=false on TextInput
[fn] readOnly input → readOnly=true on TextInput (editable stays true)
[fn] type="password" → secureTextEntry=true
[fn] type="email" → keyboardType="email-address"
[fn] type="number" → keyboardType="numeric"
[fn] type="tel" → keyboardType="phone-pad"
[fn] type="text" → default keyboard, no secureTextEntry
[fn] no type → keyboardType="default", no secureTextEntry
[fn] start slot renders in tree
[fn] start2 slot renders string as Text node
[fn] end slot renders in tree
[fn] end2 slot renders in tree
[fn] all 4 slots render simultaneously
[a11y] TextInput has accessible=true
[a11y] outer Pressable has accessible=false (tap-forwarder)
[a11y] accessibilityLabel prop maps to TextInput accessibilityLabel
[a11y] aria-label alias maps to TextInput accessibilityLabel
[a11y] disabled → accessibilityState.disabled=true on TextInput
[a11y] aria-invalid=true forwarded to TextInput
[a11y] aria-describedby forwarded to TextInput
[a11y] accessibilityHint forwarded to TextInput
[a11y] aria-hidden → TextInput accessible=false, accessibilityElementsHidden=true
[fn] BUG-INPUT-1 FIXED: all 4 Figma sizes implemented (XS/S/M/L)
[fn] BUG-INPUT-1 FIXED: size="xs" resolves to XS height (f6), not M (f10)
[bug] BUG-INPUT-2: readOnly maps to accessibilityState.disabled=true — same as disabled
[fn] BUG-INPUT-3 FIXED: standard getByPlaceholderText now finds TextInput directly
[fn] BUG-INPUT-3 FIXED: importantForAccessibility="no" — only container hidden, TextInput reachable
